rule_metadata.name: obfuscation_singlebyte_mov
rule_metadata.author: Andreas Schuster
rule_metadata.description: Detects strings obfuscated by single-byte mov ex: mov [ebp+String+1], A

rules.rule_text:
rule obfuscation_singlebyte_mov : feature obfuscation
{
	meta:
		author = "Andreas Schuster"
		description = "Detects strings obfuscated by single-byte mov ex: mov [ebp+String+1], A"
		link = "https://insights.sei.cmu.edu/sei_blog/2012/11/writing-effective-yara-signatures-to-identify-malware.html"

	strings:
		$singleb_mov = { c6 45 [2] c6 45 [2] c6 45 [2] c6 45}

	condition:
		all of them
}
